title: Links to the task in notifications and inbox don't work
excerpt: When I click on anything in notifications or the Inbox in Monday it doesn’t link to the corresponding order. I’m having a VERY hard time trying to figure out what the heck each update is. Also direct links to subitems of…

posts.author: sschill (Sally Schill)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I click on anything in notifications or the Inbox in Monday it doesn’t link to the corresponding order. I’m having a VERY hard time trying to figure out what the heck each update is. Also direct links to subitems of a task are bring up an open comment section but does not link to the task itself as it should.

Anyone else getting that?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sally!

Charlotte here from the monday team! This definitely sounds odd! Would you be able to try loading your monday account in an incognito window and let us know if you’re still experiencing this issue?

It might be worth looping in our support team about this if the issue is persistent because this doesn’t sound like normal behavior for the inbox/notifications features. You can reach us here.

posts.author: sschill (Sally Schill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Charlotte,

The support team requested I post the issue here as they couldn’t figure out a resolution. The issue does happen in an incognito window as well. I’m not the only one in my organization having this issue, there are several others.
